title: Managing Collaborators Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub collaborator management and permissions.

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, what is a 'Collaborator'?
options: Someone who downloads your code to their local machine
Someone who has been invited to have specific permissions and roles on your GitHub repository

questions.question: Which of these permissions and roles is available for your GitHub repository collaborators?
How do you invite a specific collaborator to your project on GitHub?
options: By adding their GitHub username or email to your project's settings
By sending them a copy of your local Git repository
By deleting old commits from the project
Its only possible for SQL repositories
